title: Dev v0.5.10 Feedback Submit JSON Safety Fix
notes:
Makes feedback submission verify the uploaded GitHub JSON so broken/empty feedback files are caught immediately.

Changes:
- Adds dedicated safe GitHub JSON upload for feedback.
- Validates generated JSON before upload.
- Uploads feedback with explicit base64 JSON content.
- Reads the GitHub file back after upload.
- Verifies the remote feedback JSON parses correctly.
- Shows remote JSON verified status in the feedback result.
- Keeps v0.5.9 Feedback sidebar button behavior.
